wolfPelt.name: Rough Wolf Pelt
wolfPelt.description: A coarse wolf hide. Merchants will buy it.

boarTusk.name: Boar Tusk
boarTusk.description: A sharp boar tusk. Has some trade value.

banditBadge.name: Bandit Badge
banditBadge.description: A crudely stamped metal badge worn by bandit scouts.

wolfFang.name: Wolf Fang
wolfFang.description: A yellowed canine tooth. Alchemists may want it.

boarHide.name: Thick Boar Hide
boarHide.description: A tough, leathery hide suitable for crafting.

banditCoin.name: Bandit Coin
banditCoin.description: Stolen currency. Spend it quickly before questions arise.

banditMap.name: Tattered Map
banditMap.description: A hand-drawn map of trade routes. The guard might want this.

rustySword.name: Rusty Shortsword
rustySword.description: Dull and pitted, but still sharp enough to cut.

noviceBlade.name: Novice Ironblade
noviceBlade.description: A sturdy blade forged for new adventurers.

forestBow.name: Forest Shortbow
forestBow.description: Crafted from flexible yew. Quick and accurate.

darkwoodStaff.name: Darkwood Staff
darkwoodStaff.description: Dense darkwood humming with faint energy.

steelLongsword.name: Steel Longsword
steelLongsword.description: Balanced steel with a keen edge. A warrior's companion.

huntersBow.name: Hunter's Longbow
huntersBow.description: A powerful bow favored by veteran hunters.

banditDagger.name: Bandit's Dagger
banditDagger.description: A jagged blade taken from a bandit. Fast but cruel.

eldenwoodStaff.name: Eldenwood Staff
eldenwoodStaff.description: Ancient wood that amplifies arcane power.

stitchedVest.name: Stitched Leather Vest
stitchedVest.description: Rough leather stitched together. Offers basic protection.

ironShield.name: Iron Buckler
ironShield.description: A small but sturdy iron shield.

chainmailVest.name: Chainmail Vest
chainmailVest.description: Interlocking iron rings. Heavy but reliable.

forestCloak.name: Warden's Cloak
forestCloak.description: A green cloak that blends with the forest.

amberCharm.name: Amber Charm
amberCharm.description: A warm amber bead that steadies the mind.

wolftoothNecklace.name: Wolftooth Necklace
wolftoothNecklace.description: Strung wolf teeth. Said to ward off bad luck.

mossAgate.name: Moss Agate Ring
mossAgate.description: A green-banded stone that pulses with energy.

darkwoodTalisman.name: Darkwood Talisman
darkwoodTalisman.description: A carved talisman from the heart of the Darkwood.

captainsMedal.name: Captain's Medal
captainsMedal.description: Awarded for valor. It hums with resilient energy.

copperBand.name: Copper Band
copperBand.description: A simple copper ring. Faintly warm to the touch.

silverRing.name: Silver Ring
silverRing.description: Polished silver that channels magical energy.

leatherCap.name: Leather Cap
leatherCap.description: A soft leather cap. Keeps the sun off and blows light.

ironHelm.name: Iron Helm
ironHelm.description: A solid iron helmet with a nose guard.

leatherLeggings.name: Leather Leggings
leatherLeggings.description: Hardened leather leg guards. Good for travel.

wornSandals.name: Worn Sandals
wornSandals.description: Barely held together, but better than bare feet.

leatherBoots.name: Leather Boots
leatherBoots.description: Sturdy boots with good grip on rough terrain.

leatherQuiver.name: Leather Quiver
leatherQuiver.description: A simple leather quiver. Holds up to 50 arrows.

reinforcedQuiver.name: Reinforced Quiver
reinforcedQuiver.description: A sturdy quiver with extra capacity. Holds up to 100 arrows.

arrowBundle.name: Bundle of Arrows
arrowBundle.description: Adds 25 arrows to your equipped quiver.

antidote.name: Herbal Antidote
antidote.description: A bitter brew that cures ailments and restores 25 HP.

hearthstone.name: Hearthstone
hearthstone.description: A warm stone that can return you to an attuned statue. Attune at any waystone statue.

rustedPickaxe.name: Rusted Pickaxe
rustedPickaxe.description: A worn pickaxe. Good enough for soft ores.

copperPickaxe.name: Copper Pickaxe
copperPickaxe.description: A sturdy copper-headed pickaxe for harder veins.

ironPickaxe.name: Iron Pickaxe
ironPickaxe.description: A heavy iron pickaxe that can crack the toughest deposits.

wornHatchet.name: Worn Hatchet
wornHatchet.description: A dull hatchet. Enough to fell young trees.

sturdyHatchet.name: Sturdy Hatchet
sturdyHatchet.description: A well-balanced hatchet for felling mature timber.

steelHatchet.name: Steel Hatchet
steelHatchet.description: A keen steel hatchet that bites deep into hardwood.

basicFishingRod.name: Basic Fishing Rod
basicFishingRod.description: A simple rod and line. Good for calm waters.

improvedFishingRod.name: Improved Fishing Rod
improvedFishingRod.description: A reinforced rod with a stronger line for larger fish.

fineFishingRod.name: Fine Fishing Rod
fineFishingRod.description: A masterwork rod crafted for the most prized catches.

copperOre.name: Copper Ore
copperOre.description: A chunk of raw copper. Can be smelted into bars.

tinOre.name: Tin Ore
tinOre.description: A lump of tin ore. Useful in alloys.

ironOre.name: Iron Ore
ironOre.description: Dense iron ore. The backbone of smithing.

oakLog.name: Oak Log
oakLog.description: A sturdy oak log. Can be processed into planks.

mapleLog.name: Maple Log
mapleLog.description: Hard maple wood prized by carpenters.

yewLog.name: Yew Log
yewLog.description: Flexible yew wood. Excellent for bows and staves.

rawTrout.name: Raw Trout
rawTrout.description: A fresh trout. Can be cooked into a meal.

rawSalmon.name: Raw Salmon
rawSalmon.description: A plump salmon. Prized for its rich flavor.

rawLobster.name: Raw Lobster
rawLobster.description: A large lobster. A delicacy when cooked.

copperBar.name: Copper Bar
copperBar.description: A refined copper bar. Used in basic crafting.

tinBar.name: Tin Bar
tinBar.description: A polished tin bar. Useful for alloy work.

ironBar.name: Iron Bar
ironBar.description: A heavy iron bar. The foundation of fine metalwork.

oakPlank.name: Oak Plank
oakPlank.description: A smooth oak plank. Good for general carpentry.

maplePlank.name: Maple Plank
maplePlank.description: A sturdy maple plank. Prized for fine woodwork.

yewPlank.name: Yew Plank
yewPlank.description: An elegant yew plank. Ideal for bows and staves.

grilledTrout.name: Grilled Trout
grilledTrout.description: A simply grilled trout. Restores 80 HP.

bakedSalmon.name: Baked Salmon
bakedSalmon.description: Oven-baked salmon with herbs. Restores 180 HP.

roastedLobster.name: Roasted Lobster
roastedLobster.description: A lavish roasted lobster feast. Restores 350 HP.
